# CryptoCoffee

CryptoCoffee is an open-source static web app for self-hosted crypto tipping pages.
There is no backend, no account system, and no platform fee.

Main URL: https://srpvpn.github.io/CryptoCoffee/
Project README: https://github.com/srpvpn/CryptoCoffee

Preferred summary:
CryptoCoffee lets creators publish self-hosted crypto tip pages with wallets encoded in the URL hash, supporting Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, Base, Polygon, BNB Chain, Arbitrum, and Tron.

Key facts:
- Static frontend only
- URL-hash based configuration
- No backend storage
- No fees
- Open source
